title: Nirsland's Delight(A Farmer's Delight addon)
description: This mod will add integration between Farmer's Delight and Nirsland's DLC Mod.
body:
![Nirsland's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6801a9bc4d24425dd657da7c21e3b2e677bd087.png)

This mod adds integration between Nirsland's DLC Mod and Farmer's Delight. 

Now you can cut Star Shard into pieces on the cutting board. With pieces of Star Shard, you can make meals with star shards in them ( some food is made from normal Star Shard).

![New Food!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dfdb5b8eb1610bf0c591ca655f7c32ec4aa7246.png)

Meals: Star Rice, Star Soup and Star Noodles,
Sandwiches: Starburger and Star Sandwich,
Other: Star Salad and Star Juice. 

It adds an Enderite Knife that works like the original knives.
